AST Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an AST test? 
An AST blood test measures the amount of AST in your blood. This test is commonly used to help diagnose liver damage or disease .
AST (aspartate aminotransferase) is an enzyme, a protein that speeds up certain chemical reactions in your body. It is found mainly in your liver but also in your heart, muscles, and other tissues. Usually, you will have low levels of AST in your blood. When your live
